plugins.name: bi-copilot
plugins.description: An expert BI guide for technical practitioners. v1 ships 'groundwork', a project-orientation guide that reads an unfamiliar BI/data estate, interviews you, surfaces what you don't know, and builds a living, agent-readable knowledge base.
